items.title: How Russia Put Its Future at Risk by Remaking Its Economy for War
items.description: About half of the country’s federal budget goes toward the fight in Ukraine, money that does little to support its long-term development.

items.title: China Amps Up Pressure on Japan With Restrictions on Exports
items.description: Beijing placed the restrictions on 20 Japanese entities with ties to the defense industry, the latest ratcheting up of its monthslong feud with Tokyo.

items.title: How Bookbinders Helped the Nazis Track Holocaust Victims
items.description: Conservation experts helped the Nazi regime inspect church and civil archives to track down people they sought to persecute, a researcher concluded.
